name: Panavision C-Series Anamorphic
description: Legendary lens with oval bokeh, unique horizontal blue streak lens flares, and classic vintage falloff.

name: Cooke S4/i Prime
description: Acclaimed for the warm, gentle 'Cooke Look' which renders natural skin tones and organic dimensionality.

name: Zeiss Master Prime
description: State-of-the-art lens offering extreme sharpness, high contrast, and virtually zero optical distortion.

name: Canon K35 Vintage Prime
description: Fast 1970s lenses with warm flares, organic textures, low contrast, and beautiful circular highlights.

name: Leica Summilux-C
description: Provides natural color rendering, creamy focus roll-off, and excellent performance in low-light conditions.

name: 24mm Wide-Angle Prime
description: Expansive field of view that highlights scale, environments, and immersive depth.

name: 85mm Portrait Prime
description: Compresses background elements, creating beautiful portrait rendering and highly flattering face shapes.
